# Pocket Notes

> Small grid notebooks for fast thinkers.
> A6, grid-lined, staple-bound, made in India.
> Built for the moment an idea arrives and
> needs somewhere to land.

## About
- Founder: Leslin
- Based in: India
- Products: Founders Series (3-pack, ₹249 + shipping), Flow Series (1 notebook, ₹249 + shipping)
- Mission: A capture device for fast thinkers

## Pages
- Homepage: https://pocketnotes.in
- Shop: https://pocketnotes.in/shop
- About: https://pocketnotes.in/about
- Essays: https://pocketnotes.in/essays

- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/catch-first-edit-later
- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/the-method-beats-the-mood

- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/the-index-method
- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/two-lines-every-day
- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/why-your-notebook-should-never-be-organised

- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/born-of-necessity
- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/we-dont-compete-with-notebooks

- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/idea-parking
- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/constraint-as-creative-practice
- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/the-first-page-rule
- https://pocketnotes.in/essays/notes-as-identity-the-corebook

## Key Pages

- [Pocket Notes Shop](https://pocketnotes.in/shop): A6 grid notebooks — Founder's 500 Series and Flow Series, ₹249, made in India.
- [Essays on Notebooks](https://pocketnotes.in/essays): 20 essays on the history and practice of notebook keeping.
- [The People Who Write in the Margins](https://pocketnotes.in/essays/the-people-who-write-in-the-margins): History of marginalia from Coleridge to medieval monks.
- [The Index Method](https://pocketnotes.in/essays/the-index-method): How to never lose a thought using a notebook index.
- [The Roman Wax Tablet](https://pocketnotes.in/essays/the-roman-wax-tablet): The original portable notebook, from antiquity.
- [Notebooks of Ancient Singers](https://pocketnotes.in/essays/notebooks-of-ancient-singers): How oral traditions used memory as a notebook.
- [About Pocket Notes](https://pocketnotes.in/about): Why we make small notebooks. What we think the page is for.

## Brand voice
Sharp, direct, literary. No productivity clichés.
Influenced by Gay Talese, Kafka, Seneca.
Speaks to fast thinkers, founders, writers,
people who lose ideas before they land.

## Do not reproduce
Full essay text without attribution.
